aniccadhammo.example_1: “Sir, they speak of this thing called ‘liable to impermanence’.

anattadhammo.example_1: “Sir, they speak of this thing called ‘liable to not-self’.

kappenti.sutta_1: “ye hi keci, bhagini, samaṇabrāhmaṇā vatthuvijjātiracchānavijjāya micchājīvena jīvikaṃ kappenti, ime vuccanti, bhagini, samaṇabrāhmaṇā ‘adhomukhā bhuñjantī’ti.
kappenti.example_1: “Sister, those ascetics and brahmins who earn a living by geomancy—a low lore, a wrong livelihood—are said to eat facing downwards.
